---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem statement
What problem would this feature solve? (e.g. "I want to scan YAML files but the rules don't support them yet")

## Proposed solution
Describe what you'd like to see added.

## Alternative solutions
Any alternative approaches you've considered.

## Use case
How would you use this feature? Provide an example:

```
appshield scan ./config --output json --rules new-rule-name
```

## Additional context
Any relevant links, references, or prior art.
